case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. PABLO CONTRERAS MANCERA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,321.09 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT MANCERA, PABLO CONTRERAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2017 - CONTINUED TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR TO MAY-25-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT PABLO CONTRERAS MANCERA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
